title: eleocharis obtusa
intro: Eleocharis obtusa, also known as the blunt-spiked spike-rush or blunt spike-rush, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eleocharis obtusa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as hypertension and cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
